titleStmt.title: SII 28.5: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 5. (A.R. No. 5 of 1913.) ARUMBĀVŪR, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records that Vāṇakōvaraiyan forewent the āyam (cesses or taxes) dūtavari, (cess collected to maintain government messengers or tax on gambling) śīkāriyappēṟu etc. and made as iṟaiili (tax-free) the dēvadāna lands (nan-chey) under chiṟṟēri (small lake) and periy-ēri (the big lake) (in Arampār) and pun-chey land as also such lands in Irā[ja*]rā[ja*]-nallūr and Kīrai-pāḍi (the said land in this village in specified as pūja-ppāṟu, (income to be utilised for worship of God Vaḍa-Kayilāyam-uḍaiya-nāyanār), the lands of Tirukkāḷatti-uḍaiya-nāyanār, Dukkai-paṭṭi (Durgai-paṭṭi), bloc allotted to Goddess Bhaṭāri and Ayyan-pātti (land allotted to God Ayyan) so that the whole income from the said land could be utilised as capital (uḍal) for worship and upkeep (tiruppaṇi) of Vaḍa-kayilāyam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Irācarāca tevaṟ
ku yāṇṭu patinālāvatu Arumpār Uṭaiyār vaṭaka
yilāyamuṭaiya nāyanār tevatānam ciṟṟeri nancey ni
laṅkaḷum Itil kālāl nirpāñca nilaṅkaḷum periyeri
yil nancey nilaṅkaḷum karaip puncey nilaṅkaḷum pu
ñcey nilaṅkaḷum tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiya nāyanār nañcey
puñceyyum tukkaipaṭṭi piṭāripaṭṭi Ayyanpātti U
ḷḷiṭṭa nilaṅkaḷum Innāyanāṟku Irācarāca nallūril
puñcey nilamum kiraipāṭiyil Innāyanāṟku pūcaip peṟāna
nilamum Innāyanāṟku pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalā
kat tūtavari cikāriyappeṟum maṟṟuḷḷa Āyaṅkaḷum Iḻan
tu Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭom vāṇakovaraiyaneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 28.5 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
